name: normal_or_hpv_negative_low_risk
description: Normal or HPV-negative low-risk screening profile.
prototype_text: Clinical prior category: routine screening or low-risk surveillance. HPV negative or no high-risk cytology. Expected posterior belief favors low-risk cervical status unless imaging provides contradictory evidence.

name: hpv_positive_nilm_surveillance
description: HPV-positive profile with negative cytology or surveillance-level risk.
prototype_text: Clinical prior category: HPV-positive screening profile with NILM or surveillance-level cytology. Expected posterior belief assigns elevated but non-definitive risk and requires image-based refinement.

name: ascus_or_lsil_low_grade_abnormality
description: Low-grade cytologic abnormality such as ASC-US or LSIL.
prototype_text: Clinical prior category: low-grade cytologic abnormality such as ASC-US or LSIL. Expected posterior belief supports low-grade disease but remains sensitive to colposcopy and OCT evidence.

name: asch_or_agc_high_risk_triage
description: Atypical high-risk triage profile such as ASC-H or AGC.
prototype_text: Clinical prior category: atypical high-risk triage result such as ASC-H or AGC. Expected posterior belief increases concern for clinically significant lesions and prioritizes confirmatory visual evidence.

name: hsil_or_cin2plus_high_grade_lesion
description: High-grade lesion profile consistent with HSIL or CIN2+ risk.
prototype_text: Clinical prior category: high-grade lesion profile consistent with HSIL or CIN2+ risk. Expected posterior belief favors high-grade cervical lesion when multimodal evidence is concordant.

name: cancer_suspicious_invasive_disease
description: Cancer-suspicious profile requiring urgent diagnostic confirmation.
prototype_text: Clinical prior category: cancer-suspicious or invasive disease concern. Expected posterior belief places strong weight on urgent diagnostic confirmation and severe multimodal evidence.
